ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "ind" INTEGER /* Unique index for each demographic record */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time period of the recorded data (e.g., survey year) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age group represented in the data */,
  "male" INTEGER /* Number of males in the age group */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Number of females in the age group */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the population */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Size of households */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ind"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_female FOREIGN KEY ("female") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_male FOREIGN KEY ("male") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age FOREIGN KEY ("age") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_time FOREIGN KEY ("time") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the region is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* String representation of the age range (e.g., '0-18', '19-30') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender type */,
  "gender_type" TEXT /* Type of gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health metric */,
  "ind" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of health metric (e.g., BMI, Blood Pressure) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the survey */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_ind FOREIGN KEY ("ind") REFERENCES demographics ("ind")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., Planned, Conducted, Analyzed) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., Health, Demographic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "ind" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ind FOREIGN KEY ("ind") REFERENCES demographics ("ind"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "ind" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., correlation, regression) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "tool_used" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion or summary of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_ind FOREIGN KEY ("ind") REFERENCES demographics ("ind"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
